name: medical clinic intake coordinators processing 10–20 patient eligibility verifications/month tool
description: For medical clinic intake coordinators processing 10–20 invoices/month, time-consuming manual verification causes delays in patient intake. We automate eligibility reporting instead of manual verification processes using spreadsheets and phone calls.
target_audience: medical clinic intake coordinators processing 10–20 patient eligibility verifications/month
problem_solved: Time-consuming manual verification of patient insurance eligibility
